title: Minimum Increment to Make Array Unique
titleCn: 使数组唯一的最小增量

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,2] Output: 1 Explanation: After 1 move, the array could be [1, 2, 3].
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: After 1 move, the array could be [1, 2, 3].

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1,2,1,7] Output: 6 Explanation: After 6 moves, the array could be [3, 4, 1, 2, 5, 7]. It can be shown that it is impossible for the array to have all unique values with 5 or less moves.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: After 6 moves, the array could be [3, 4, 1, 2, 5, 7]. It can be shown that it is impossible for the array to have all unique values with 5 or less moves.
